description: Every Maestro deal, avails forecast, and report — scriptable, with a local database and offline analytics the web UI and official MCP server can't match.

params.description: 168-character bitmask representing the weekly delivery schedule (7 days × 24 hours). Position = (day_index × 24) + hour_index, where day 0 = Monday, hour 0 = 00:00–01:00. '1' = active, '0' = inactive. Null means no schedule restriction (budget delivers at all hours). Only applicable to line item budgets; ignored for campaign and company budgets.
